exact_blockers: GitHub backend + frontend + browser regression failed because Kshudhita pipeline card/selectors were missing after UX refactor.
GitHub controlled-launch/catalog regression failed because tests required stale exact catalog equality instead of truthful reader-only/audio-hidden source state.
Vercel preview was canceled/skipped by frontend/vercel.json ignoreCommand on non-main branches.
visual-luxury-smoke could pass without proving Playwright browser execution.
minimum_safe_fix: Restore stable Kshudhita pipeline test ids and safe notify CTA without exposing reader/audio access.
Update catalog regressions to enforce inclusion, no duplicates, reader-only/audio-hidden truth, and source-controlled PR fallback without approving audiobooks.
Add fail-safe Vercel ignore helper that builds PR branches with frontend/config changes and skips only clear no-op preview changes.
Make visual smoke fail closed on no target, Playwright import failure, browser launch failure, timeout, parse failure, or incomplete route checks.
Allow production-equivalent REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=/api builds to validate same-origin locally instead of calling production API cross-origin.
preview_deploy_strategy: Commit and push the blocker rescue patch to the existing PR branch, then let Vercel Git integration rerun preview. If manual CLI validation is needed, prefer npx --yes vercel@latest inspect <deployment-url> rather than the outdated global CLI.
rollback_plan: Revert the blocker rescue commit only. No production metadata, Bengali audio, generated cover assets, release_gate outputs, or destructive changes are included.
